description: Maths, Physics & Chemistry stream for engineering and science careers.
overview: MPC is the most popular intermediate group for students who want to pursue engineering, architecture, defence and pure sciences. It builds a strong foundation in mathematics and physical sciences.
eligibility: Pass in 10th class (SSC) with good marks in Maths and Science.
careerGrowth: Leads to B.Tech, B.Sc, NDA and other technical degrees, opening doors to engineering and research careers.

description: Biology, Physics & Chemistry stream for medical and life-science careers.
overview: BiPC is ideal for students aiming for medicine, nursing, pharmacy, agriculture and biotechnology. It focuses on biology along with physical sciences.
eligibility: Pass in 10th class (SSC) with interest in biology and science.
careerGrowth: Leads to MBBS, BDS, B.Sc Nursing, B.Pharm and agriculture courses through NEET and EAPCET.

description: 3-year technical diploma to become a junior engineer quickly.
overview: Polytechnic is a practical, job-oriented diploma after 10th. It is shorter than a degree and lets students enter the workforce or join engineering through lateral entry.
eligibility: Pass in 10th class; admission through POLYCET.
careerGrowth: Work as a diploma technician or take lateral entry directly into the 2nd year of B.Tech.

description: 4-year degree to become a professional engineer.
overview: B.Tech is a four-year professional engineering degree with branches like CSE, ECE, Mechanical and Civil. It is one of the most chosen paths after MPC.
eligibility: Intermediate (MPC) with qualifying rank in JEE / EAPCET.
careerGrowth: Grow from graduate engineer to senior engineer, team lead and manager, or pursue M.Tech / MS abroad.

description: Become a doctor through the MBBS degree.
overview: MBBS is the core medical degree to become a doctor. It involves 4.5 years of study plus one year of internship.
eligibility: Intermediate (BiPC) and a qualifying score in NEET.
careerGrowth: Specialise via MD/MS, become a consultant, surgeon or open your own practice.

description: General degree courses for diverse career options.
overview: Degree courses give flexible career options in science, commerce and arts. They also form the base for competitive exams and post-graduation.
eligibility: Pass in Intermediate in any relevant group.
careerGrowth: Continue to PG (M.Sc/M.Com/MA), MBA, or prepare for government jobs and civil services.

description: Stable central government jobs through Railway Recruitment Board.
overview: Indian Railways is one of the largest employers in the country, offering technical and non-technical posts with great job security and benefits.
eligibility: 10th / ITI / Degree depending on the post; selection via RRB exams.
careerGrowth: Promotions through departmental exams and seniority from Group D to officer-level posts.

description: Banking sector jobs through IBPS and SBI exams.
overview: Banking offers respected and stable careers as Probationary Officers and Clerks in public sector banks with good pay and growth.
eligibility: Graduation in any discipline; selection via IBPS / SBI exams.
careerGrowth: Grow from Clerk/PO to Manager, Chief Manager and General Manager over time.

description: Central government posts through Staff Selection Commission.
overview: SSC recruits for various central government departments through exams like CGL and CHSL, offering stable office jobs.
eligibility: 12th / Graduation depending on the exam.
careerGrowth: Promotions to higher administrative posts within departments over the years.

description: Design software, systems and applications.
overview: Computer Science Engineering is the most in-demand branch, covering programming, data, AI and software systems used by every industry.
eligibility: B.Tech in CSE / IT after Intermediate MPC.
careerGrowth: Software Engineer to Senior Engineer, Architect, and Engineering Manager; high demand globally.

description: Design and build machines and mechanical systems.
overview: Mechanical engineering deals with design, manufacturing and maintenance of machines, engines and tools across core industries.
eligibility: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering after Intermediate MPC.
careerGrowth: Graduate Engineer to Design Lead and Plant Manager in manufacturing and automotive sectors.

description: Plan and construct buildings, roads and infrastructure.
overview: Civil engineering focuses on designing and building infrastructure like buildings, bridges, dams and highways.
eligibility: B.Tech in Civil Engineering after Intermediate MPC.
careerGrowth: Site Engineer to Project Manager; opportunities in government and private construction firms.

description: Diagnose and treat patients as a medical doctor.
overview: Doctors are highly respected professionals who diagnose illnesses and treat patients. The path starts with MBBS and continues with specialisation.
eligibility: Intermediate (BiPC) and NEET qualification.
careerGrowth: Specialise as a surgeon or consultant via MD/MS and build a long, secure career.

description: Care for patients and support medical teams.
overview: Nursing is a noble healthcare profession with strong demand in India and abroad. Nurses provide patient care and assist doctors.
eligibility: Intermediate (BiPC); admission to B.Sc Nursing.
careerGrowth: Staff Nurse to Head Nurse and Nursing Superintendent; high demand for overseas jobs.

description: Prepare and dispense medicines.
overview: Pharmacists are experts in medicines, working in hospitals, pharmacies and drug manufacturing companies.
eligibility: Intermediate (BiPC / MPC); admission to B.Pharm.
careerGrowth: Work in pharma companies, hospitals, or open a medical store; grow with M.Pharm.

description: Commerce degree for finance, accounting and business.
overview: B.Com builds skills in accounting, finance, taxation and business, and is a base for CA, CS, MBA and government exams.
eligibility: Intermediate (any group, preferably commerce).
careerGrowth: Move into accounting, banking, CA/CS, or MBA for management roles.

description: Science degree for research and technical careers.
overview: B.Sc covers subjects like physics, chemistry, maths and computer science, leading to research, teaching and IT careers.
eligibility: Intermediate (MPC / BiPC).
careerGrowth: Continue to M.Sc and research, IT jobs, or teaching and competitive exams.

description: Arts degree for humanities and civil services.
overview: B.A offers subjects like history, economics, political science and languages, and is popular among civil services aspirants.
eligibility: Intermediate (any group).
careerGrowth: Path to civil services, journalism, law, teaching and management.

description: Practical diploma in construction and infrastructure.
overview: This polytechnic diploma trains students in surveying, construction and structural basics for junior engineer roles.
eligibility: 10th pass; admission through POLYCET.
careerGrowth: Work as a junior engineer or take lateral entry into B.Tech Civil.

description: Diploma in electronics and communication.
overview: This diploma covers electronics, circuits and communication systems, preparing students for technician and junior engineer jobs.
eligibility: 10th pass; admission through POLYCET.
careerGrowth: Electronics technician roles or lateral entry into B.Tech ECE.

description: Skilled trade in electrical wiring and maintenance.
overview: The ITI Electrician trade teaches wiring, motors and electrical maintenance, leading to quick employment in industries and self-work.
eligibility: 8th / 10th pass depending on the trade.
careerGrowth: Apprenticeship to skilled electrician, supervisor, or start your own electrical service.

description: Skilled trade in assembling and fitting machine parts.
overview: The ITI Fitter trade focuses on assembling, installing and maintaining mechanical components, valued across manufacturing industries.
eligibility: 8th / 10th pass.
careerGrowth: Apprenticeship to skilled fitter and supervisor in core industries and PSUs.

description: Top administrative service of the Government of India.
overview: The Indian Administrative Service is the most prestigious civil service, leading districts and shaping public policy. Entry is via the UPSC Civil Services Exam.
eligibility: Graduation in any discipline; clear UPSC CSE (Prelims, Mains, Interview).
careerGrowth: From Sub-Collector to District Collector, Secretary and Chief Secretary.

description: Indian Police Service for law and order leadership.
overview: The Indian Police Service leads the police force, maintaining law and order and ensuring public safety. Entry is via UPSC CSE.
eligibility: Graduation in any discipline; clear UPSC CSE and meet physical standards.
careerGrowth: From ASP/SP to DIG, IG and Director General of Police.

description: Build websites, apps and software products.
overview: Software developers design, write and maintain code for applications and systems. It is one of the highest paying and fastest growing careers.
eligibility: B.Tech / B.Sc / BCA or self-taught with strong coding skills.
careerGrowth: Junior Developer to Senior Developer, Tech Lead and Engineering Manager.

description: Analyse data to drive decisions using AI and ML.
overview: Data scientists use statistics, machine learning and programming to extract insights from data. It is a high-demand, high-pay role.
eligibility: Degree in CS / Maths / Statistics with data skills.
careerGrowth: Data Analyst to Data Scientist, ML Engineer and Head of Data.

description: Design easy and beautiful digital experiences.
overview: UI/UX designers craft how apps and websites look and feel, focusing on usability and user satisfaction.
eligibility: Any degree with a strong design portfolio.
careerGrowth: Junior Designer to Senior Designer, Design Lead and Product Designer.
